mvrv.label: MVRV
mvrv.read: Price against what the average holder paid. Above 3 is top-heavy. Near 1 is where bottoms are built.

sth_mvrv.label: STH MVRV
sth_mvrv.read: Same ratio, recent buyers only. Below 1 means the last five months of demand is underwater.

lth_mvrv.label: LTH MVRV
lth_mvrv.read: Same ratio, long-term holders only. Extreme highs are when old money starts distributing.

nupl.label: NUPL
nupl.read: Unrealized profit in the network. Above 0.75 is euphoria. Below zero is capitulation.

supply_in_profit.label: Supply in Profit
supply_in_profit.read: Share of coins worth more than their last move price. Under 60% is where weak hands finish selling.

drawdown.label: Drawdown from ATH
drawdown.read: How far price sits below the all-time high. Every cycle bottom has printed between 70% and 85% down. Anything shallower than that historically has not been the floor.

reserve_risk.label: Reserve Risk
reserve_risk.read: Holder conviction against the price to bet alongside it. Low is the best risk-reward this asset offers.

rhodl.label: RHODL Ratio
rhodl.read: New money versus old money. Spikes mark tops. Low readings mean the tourists have left.

liveliness.label: Liveliness
liveliness.read: Coin-days spent versus held. Rising means holders are distributing. Falling means supply is locking up.

sell_side_risk.label: Sell-Side Risk
sell_side_risk.read: Realized profit and loss against market size. Low means an exhausted market, right before it turns.

lth_nupl.label: LTH NUPL
lth_nupl.read: Unrealized profit of long-term holders. When it gets extreme, distribution follows.

sth_nupl.label: STH NUPL
sth_nupl.read: Unrealized profit of recent buyers. Negative means the last five months of demand is underwater.

sopr.label: SOPR
sopr.read: Are coins moving at a profit or a loss. Below 1 means the market is selling underwater, a capitulation tell.

sth_sopr.label: STH SOPR
sth_sopr.read: Same, recent buyers only. Persistent sub-1 readings are where short-term pain bottoms out.

lth_sopr.label: LTH SOPR
lth_sopr.read: Same, long-term holders only. Spikes mark old coins taking profit into strength.

puell.label: Puell Multiple
puell.read: Miner revenue against its yearly average. Below 1.0, forced selling dries up. That marks every cycle low.

thermocap.label: Thermocap Multiple
thermocap.read: Price against every dollar ever spent to secure the network. The most conservative valuation bitcoin has.

fear_greed.label: Fear & Greed
fear_greed.read: Crowd sentiment in one number. Extreme fear is where the best entries are made. A contrarian gauge.

levels_table.label: Realized Price
levels_table.meaning: Average price every coin last moved

m2.label: US M2 Money Supply
m2.read: Total money in the system. It never meaningfully contracts. Every new dollar chases a fixed 21 million.

dxy.label: Dollar Index
dxy.read: The dollar against everything else. Strong dollar drains liquidity. Falling dollar releases it, and bitcoin runs.

us10y.label: US 10-Year Yield
us10y.read: The price of money for the world. Rising yields tighten everything. Falling yields mean the Fed is losing control.

us2y.label: US 2-Year Yield
us2y.read: The market's read on the Fed's next move. Below the funds rate, it is pricing cuts the Fed hasn't admitted.

us30y.label: US 30-Year Yield
us30y.read: Where fiscal credibility gets priced. A rising 30-year while the Fed cuts is the bond market calling the bluff.
